title: Labeling Error
content: Any mismatch between the specimen label and the order (missing patient identifier, illegible label, two-identifier mismatch, or unlabeled tube) is a patient-safety issue and must never be resolved by relabeling in the lab. Disposition: reject with no retest performed until the collection site confirms patient identity and provides a correctly labeled specimen. This category should always be escalated to a supervisor rather than auto-dispositioned, regardless of model confidence, because a mislabel carries wrong-patient-result risk that outweighs turnaround-time considerations.
